description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On August 29, 2024 at 11:38 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a fixed object (exterior wall next to a garage).  
 
The Waymo AV was making a left turn around a cul-de-sac-style driveway at a low rate of speed when the front passenger side corner of 
the Waymo AV made contact with the corner of a garage stucco wall. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was 
engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV and the wall sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
